narrative:
Sugarcreek 150 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,302 registered voters, with 62.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a clear Republican lean of 8.5 percentage points.
